description: Manage workspace membership: invite, change roles, revoke, and audit

userStories.title: Add membership audit log schema
userStories.description: As an admin, I want membership changes recorded so actions are auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add audit table with actor, action, target, timestamp

userStories.title: Invite member by email
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite a member by email so they can join workspace.

userStories.title: Change member role
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member's role between viewer, editor, admin so permissions update.
acceptanceCriteria: Role change API updates membership record

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke a member's access so they can no longer access workspace data.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke removes membership and invalidates sessions/tokens

userStories.title: Review recent membership changes in settings page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so I can monitor activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page lists recent audit entries
Pagination or recent N entries visible
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
